ARTICLES ABOUT NATURAL CALAMITIES AND
EPIDEMICS
1..Why there is so much of rain in Tamilnadu and other southern states-
Sunday,
December 11,2005 6.53 AM
Varahamihra the unparallel genius in mundane astrology gives lot of emphasis on
nimitta in his classical book. if you see lot of techniques and slokas in his book,
they are based on the plain observation and also on nimitas . there are several
reason to stress on nimita . First of all one does not get the correct birth time of
nations and individuals . one can easily use the predictions based on these celestial
events.
Let us see what happened in the state of Tamilnadu. Mars came close to the earth.
Mars is bhumi karaka it can came closer to earth .
